retrieved_result: Fluon Â®PTFE Fluon ®PTFEHighly cost-effective materials, Fluon ® PTFE (Polytetrafluoroethylene) Resins are the most widely used fluoropolymers found in many areas of modern life. Resin properties keep insulation thickness to a minimum while tolerating a wider range of temperatures (-180 °C to 260 °C) than other
Decision_Reason: The page discusses Fluon PTFE resins and their properties, not DIY room decoration ideas; content is unrelated to the search query.
